payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Tall dark brown wooden cabinet/wardrobe door with a rectangular recessed panel and matte finish; bottom is partially occluded by a silver suitcase and the right edge of the door is cropped in the image, with faint scuffs visible on the surface; appears to be about 1.0 m from the camera.
